videoSnippet.title: A Game of Surprises || Abdusattorov vs Mamedyarov || UzChess Cup 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Abdusattorov, Nodirbek (2777) - Mamedyarov, Shakhriyar (2717)
3rd UzChess Cup 2026 (Chess.com) [02] 2026.06.08
B35 Sicilian, accelerated fianchetto, modern variation with Bc4

1.e4 c5 2.Nf3 g6 3.d4 cxd4 4.Nxd4 Nc6 5.Nc3 Bg7 6.Be3 Nf6 7.Bc4 O-O 8.Bb3 d6 9.f3 Qa5 10.Qd3 Nd7 11.Bd5 e6 12.Bb3 Nde5 13.Qd2 Nxd4 14.Bxd4 b5 15.a3 Rd8 16.O-O-O Rb8 17.f4 Nc6 18.Bxg7 Kxg7 19.h4 b4 20.axb4 Rxb4 21.Kb1 d5 22.h5 dxe4 23.h6+ Kf8 24.Qe3 Rxd1+ 25.Rxd1 Qb6 26.Qe1 Rd4 27.Nxe4 Rxd1+ 28.Qxd1 Qd4 29.Qe1 Ba6 30.g3 Bc4 31.Bxc4 Qxc4 32.b3 Qd4 33.Ng5 Nb4 34.Nxh7+ Kg8 35.Ng5 Nd5 36.h7+ Kf8 37.c4

0:01 Hello Everyone!
01:05 Game Starts!
03:00 CNG (Nd7)
12:50 Pause the Video!
14:20 IWITP
